[[File:ValleyoftheWind2.jpg|thumb|left|230px|A view from within the Valley]]
The '''Valley of the Winds''' was located near [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. A canyon located between two [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], one high and cool, the other low and hot. Throughout the day, the fierce winds shifted the sand back and forth between the two areas, these sand tides eroding away at the canyon's surface, leaving it smooth but jagged.

The nature of the Valley inspired [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to conceive [[The Teeth of Tatooine]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], the Valley of the Winds was one of many designated planetary regions, prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. However, in the game, "Winds" was not plural.
